sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_rand (id UInt32, random_value UInt32) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_rand (id, random_value) VALUES (1, rand()), (2, rand()), (3, rand());
UPDATE test_rand SET random_value = rand() WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, random_value FROM test_rand WHERE random_value > 1000000000;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_rand WHERE random_value % 2 = 0;
